name: Acid Splash
description: Ranged touch attack; 1d3 acid damage.

name: Detect Magic
description: Detects spells and magic items within 60 ft. cone. Each round of concentration reveals more: 1st presence/absence; 2nd number of auras and strongest; 3rd school and strength of each.

name: Light
description: Object shines like a torch (20 ft. bright, +20 ft. shadowy).

name: Mage Hand
target: One nonmagical, unattended object weighing up to 5 lb.
description: Move object up to 15 ft. with telekinetic force.

name: Prestidigitation
description: Minor magical tricks — clean, soil, color, chill/warm, flavor up to 1 lb. material; create small object lasting 1 hour.

name: Ray of Frost
description: Ranged touch attack; 1d3 cold damage.

name: Read Magic
description: Read scrolls, spellbooks, and magical writing.

name: Resistance
description: +1 resistance bonus on saving throws.

name: Cure Minor Wounds
description: Cures 1 hit point.

name: Guidance
description: +1 competence bonus on a single attack roll, save, or skill check.

name: Burning Hands
description: 1d4 fire damage per caster level (max 5d4).

name: Charm Person
description: Target regards caster as trusted friend; +5 bonus on the save if currently being threatened/attacked.

name: Color Spray
description: 2 HD or less: unconscious 2d4 rounds, blind 1d4, stunned 1; 3-4 HD: blind 1d4, stunned 1; 5+ HD: stunned 1 round.

name: Comprehend Languages
description: Understand all spoken and written languages.

name: Disguise Self
description: Change appearance (±1 ft. height, similar build, clothing). Failed Spot reveals illusion as +10 DC.

name: Enlarge Person
description: Target grows one size category larger: +2 Str, -2 Dex, -1 attack, -1 AC, reach increased.

name: Feather Fall
target: Personal or one Medium or smaller freefalling object or creature/level, no two of which can be more than 20 ft. apart
description: Falling objects/creatures fall slowly; 60 ft./round, no damage on landing.

name: Grease
description: Coat object or area in grease: Balance DC 10 to move at half speed across; fail by 5+ falls. Held object: Reflex save or drop.

name: Mage Armor
description: +4 armor bonus to AC (force, so works against incorporeal touch attacks).

name: Magic Missile
target: Up to five creatures, no two more than 15 ft. apart
description: 1d4+1 force damage per missile; +1 missile per 2 levels above 1st (max 5 at CL 9).

name: Magic Weapon
description: Weapon gains +1 enhancement bonus to attack and damage.

name: Obscuring Mist
target: Cloud spreads in 20-ft. radius, 20 ft. high
description: Fog obscures vision; creatures 5 ft. away have concealment (20% miss), 10+ ft. total concealment (50% miss, no Spot).

name: Shield
description: +4 shield bonus to AC. Negates magic missile.

name: Sleep
description: Puts to sleep 4 HD of creatures, beginning with lowest HD. Cannot affect 4+ HD or undead/constructs.

name: True Strike
description: +20 insight bonus on your next attack roll within 1 round.

name: Unseen Servant
description: Invisible force performs simple tasks; Str 2, speed 15 ft., 2 HP, no attacks.

name: Bless
target: Allies in 50-ft. burst centered on you
description: +1 morale bonus on attack rolls and saves vs. fear.

name: Command
description: One-word command (approach, drop, fall, flee, halt) target obeys for 1 round.

name: Cure Light Wounds
description: Cures 1d8 + caster level (max +5) hit points.

name: Detect Undead
description: As detect magic, but for undead.

name: Doom
description: Target becomes shaken (-2 attack, save, check, damage).

name: Inflict Light Wounds
description: 1d8 + caster level (max +5) damage; heals undead.

name: Protection from Evil
description: +2 deflection AC and +2 resistance save vs. evil creatures; suppresses mind control by evil; prevents mental contact and bodily possession.

name: Sanctuary
description: Opponents must succeed Will save to target subject; subject can't attack without ending the spell.

name: Shield of Faith
description: +2 deflection bonus to AC, +1 per 6 caster levels (max +5).

name: Entangle
description: Plants in area entangle creatures: failed save = entangled; success = can move at half speed.

name: Acid Arrow
description: Ranged touch; 2d4 acid initially; 2d4 each subsequent round (no save, no SR).

name: Bull's Strength
description: +4 enhancement to Strength.

name: Cat's Grace
description: +4 enhancement to Dexterity.

name: Bear's Endurance
description: +4 enhancement to Constitution (extra HP do not heal damage taken).

name: Eagle's Splendor
description: +4 enhancement to Charisma.

name: Fox's Cunning
description: +4 enhancement to Intelligence.

name: Owl's Wisdom
description: +4 enhancement to Wisdom.

name: Detect Thoughts
description: Detect presence of thoughts; 2nd round count; 3rd round surface thoughts (Will save to block).

name: Flaming Sphere
description: Sphere of fire rolls 30 ft./round; touch deals 3d6 fire (Reflex negates).

name: Glitterdust
description: Visible glitter outlines invisible creatures; targets blinded (Will negates blindness only).

name: Invisibility
target: You or a creature/object weighing no more than 100 lb./level
description: Target becomes invisible (+20 Hide if moving, +40 if still). Ends if target attacks.

name: Knock
description: Opens stuck, barred, locked, or magically locked doors/containers (DC 20 + 1/2 caster level vs. arcane lock).

name: Levitate
target: You or one willing creature or object (up to 100 lb./level)
description: Move target up or down at 20 ft./round (no horizontal motion).

name: Mirror Image
description: 1d4 + 1 image per 3 caster levels (max 8) of you; attackers must randomly target a figment.

name: Scorching Ray
description: Ranged touch; 4d6 fire per ray. +1 ray at 7th level, +1 more at 11th (max 3).

name: See Invisibility
description: See invisible creatures and objects normally.

name: Web
description: Sticky webs fill area; entangle creatures (Reflex negates initial; Str/Escape Artist to break free). Burns easily (2d4 fire to anyone caught).

name: Cure Moderate Wounds
description: Cures 2d8 + caster level (max +10) hit points.

name: Hold Person
description: Target paralyzed (no actions, helpless).

name: Silence
target: 20-ft.-radius emanation centered on point or creature
description: No sound in area; spells with verbal components fail.

name: Spiritual Weapon
description: Magical weapon attacks (1d8 + 1/3 levels force damage) directed by caster (move action).

name: Sound Burst
description: 1d8 sonic damage and stunned 1 round (Fort negates stun).

name: Dispel Magic
target: One creature, object, area, or spell
description: Targeted or counterspell or area. Caster level check 1d20 + CL (max +10) vs. DC 11 + target's CL.

name: Fireball
description: 1d6 fire per caster level (max 10d6) in area.

name: Fly
description: Subject flies at 60 ft. (good maneuverability), 40 ft. in medium load or armor.

name: Haste
target: One creature/level, no two more than 30 ft. apart
description: +1 attack on full attack, +1 dodge AC, +1 reflex, +30 ft. speed.

name: Lightning Bolt
description: 1d6 electricity per caster level (max 10d6) in line.

name: Slow
target: One creature/level, no two more than 30 ft. apart
description: Targets take only one action/round (standard OR move), -1 attack, -1 AC, -1 reflex, speed halved.

name: Stinking Cloud
description: Creatures in cloud are nauseated (Fortitude negates); fog obscures sight as obscuring mist.

name: Summon Monster III
description: Summons one 3rd-level creature (or 1d3 2nd-level or 1d4+1 1st-level) to fight for you.

name: Vampiric Touch
description: Melee touch; 1d6 damage per two caster levels (max 10d6). Caster gains temp HP equal to damage (max ½ target's HP).

name: Bestow Curse
description: Curses target: choose -6 to one ability, -4 attack/saves/checks, or 50% chance to lose action each turn.

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: Cures 3d8 + caster level (max +15) hit points.

name: Searing Light
description: Ranged touch; 1d8 per 2 caster levels (max 5d8); +1d6/CL vs. undead (max 10d6); double damage vs. light-vulnerable.

name: Magic Circle Against Evil
description: As protection from evil, but in a 10-ft. radius. Can serve as binding circle (with circle drawn).

name: Animate Dead
description: Animate skeletons or zombies. HD total limited to 4 × caster level. Requires 25 gp of black onyx per HD.

name: Speak with Dead
description: Ask the corpse questions: 1 question/2 levels (max 6). Corpse must have mouth and not be undead.

name: Aid
description: +1 morale bonus on attack rolls and saves vs. fear; +1d8 temporary hit points.

name: Blink
description: Caster randomly shifts between Material and Ethereal Plane each round: 50% miss chance on attacks vs. caster; caster's own attacks miss 20% of the time.

name: Protection from Energy
description: Absorbs up to 12 points/level (max 120) of damage from one chosen energy type (acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic).

name: Water Breathing
duration: 2 hours/level (D); divide freely among touched creatures
description: Subjects can breathe water freely; also breathe air normally.

name: Nondetection
description: Hides target from divination magic. Caster level check (DC 11 + caster level of divination attempt) to penetrate.

name: Gaseous Form
description: Subject becomes insubstantial: DR 10/magic, immune to poison/sneak attack/critical hits; fly 10 ft. (perfect); can slip through small cracks. Cannot attack or cast spells.

name: Cure Critical Wounds
description: Cures 4d8 + caster level (max +20) hit points.

name: Death Ward
description: Subject is immune to all death spells, magical death effects, energy drain, and negative energy effects.

name: Dimension Door
target: You and touched objects or other touched willing creatures
description: Teleport up to Long range (no line of effect needed). Bring up to 800 lb. + willing creatures. Can arrive off-target on 1-in-10.

name: Fear
description: Affected creatures flee at top speed (Will save: shaken 1 round instead).

name: Freedom of Movement
description: Subject moves normally despite magical effects (entangle, web, slow, hold person, etc.).

name: Holy Smite
description: 1d8 damage per 2 caster levels (max 5d8) to evil creatures (Will half); neutral creatures take half. Evil creatures blinded 1 round (Will negates).

name: Restoration
description: Removes negative levels (100 gp diamond dust per negative level), restores one drained ability score point, removes fatigue/exhaustion.

name: Order's Wrath
description: 1d8 damage per 2 caster levels (max 5d8) vs. chaotic creatures; neutral creatures take half. Chaotic creatures also dazed 1 round (Will negates daze).

name: Wall of Fire
target: Opaque sheet of flame up to 20 ft. high + 5 ft./4 levels wide; or ring of fire 5 ft./2 levels diameter
description: Passing through deals 2d6+1 fire damage/CL (max +20); within 10 ft. of far side 2d4 fire/round; within 20 ft. 1d4 fire/round.

name: Polymorph
description: Subject assumes any creature form with HD ≤ caster level (max own HD +5). Gains physical stats of new form; retains own mental stats and abilities.

name: Scrying
description: Creates a magical sensor on or near the target creature (Will negates; modified by familiarity). You can see and hear through the sensor.

name: Cone of Cold
description: 1d6 cold damage per caster level (max 15d6).

name: Flame Strike
description: 1d6 damage per caster level (max 15d6). Half is fire damage, half is divine (bypasses fire resistance/immunity).

name: Raise Dead
description: Restores life to creature dead ≤ 1 day/level. Subject loses one level (or 2 Con if 1st-level). Requires 5,000 gp diamond. Cannot restore lost limbs or raise constructs/elementals/undead.

name: True Seeing
description: Subject sees through illusions, sees invisible creatures/objects, sees into the Ethereal (60 ft.), detects secret doors (Search DC 20), sees true form of polymorphed or disguised creatures.

name: Teleport
target: You and touched objects or other willing creatures (up to 50 lb./level)
description: Transport yourself and companions anywhere on the same plane. Accuracy depends on familiarity: very familiar (on target), studied carefully (similar area/off target/mishap at 94/98/00).

name: Dispel Evil
target: You and a touched evil creature from another plane, or enchantment/evil spell on a touched creature
description: Gain +4 deflection to AC vs. evil; touch evil extraplanar creature: CL check vs. DC 11+creature's CL to send it back to its plane. Or: remove enchantment cast by an evil creature.

name: Summon Monster V
description: Summons one 5th-level creature (or 1d3 4th-level or 1d4+1 3rd-level) to fight for you.

name: Shield Other
description: Subject gains +1 deflection to AC and +1 resistance on saves. Caster takes half of all damage dealt to subject.

name: Heal
description: Cures 10 hp/caster level (max 150); removes all diseases, blindness, deafness, ability damage, exhaustion, and negative energy effects. Damages undead for same amount.

name: Word of Recall
target: You and willing creatures within 5 ft./2 caster levels
description: Teleport yourself and willing companions to your pre-designated sanctuary. Sanctuary must be familiar and must be set when this spell is learned.

name: Necrotic Cyst
description: Implants a necrotic sac of tissue in the target. Victim takes –2 penalty on saves vs. necromancy spells and +1d6 damage from undead natural attacks. Surgical removal requires DC 20 Heal check (failure kills patient). Requires caster to possess a mother cyst (see LM p.28).

name: Necrotic Bloat
description: Agitates an implanted necrotic cyst, dealing 1d6 damage/level (max 10d6); half is vile damage (requires consecrate/hallow area to heal). Requires caster to possess a mother cyst.

name: Necrotic Burst
description: Causes cyst to explode. On successful save: 1d6/level (max 15d6), half vile. On failed save: target dies instantly and cyst exits as a free-willed skulking cyst. Requires mother cyst.

name: Necrotic Domination
description: Functions as dominate person but works on any humanoid harboring a necrotic cyst. Requires mother cyst.

name: Plague of Undead
target: One or more corpses within range
description: Mass animate dead—raises up to 4× caster level HD of skeletons/zombies from corpses in range (same control cap as animate dead: 4× CL HD total). Material component: black sapphire worth 100 gp.

name: Summon Undead I
description: Summons one undead from the 1st-level list (Medium skeleton or Small zombie). Summoned undead don't count against HD control limit. Focus: tiny bag, small candle, carved humanoid bone.

name: Summon Undead III
description: Summons one undead from the 3rd-level list (Ghoul, Huge skeleton, or Large zombie), two from the 2nd-level list, or four from the 1st-level list.

name: Summon Undead V
description: Summons one undead from the 5th-level list (Mummy, Shadow, Vampire spawn, or Wight), two from 4th-level, or four from lower-level lists.

name: Veil of Undeath
description: Caster gains all undead immunities (mind-affecting, poison, sleep, paralysis, stunning, disease, death effects, crits, nonlethal, ability/energy drain, fatigue, exhaustion, Fortitude-targeting effects). Con becomes —; cure spells damage, inflict spells heal. Caster is not actually undead type. Material: black sapphire 1,000 gp.

name: Avasculate
description: Ray reduces target to half current HP (rounded down) and stuns for 1 round. Successful Fort save negates stun but not HP loss.

name: Energy Ebb
description: Target gains 1 negative level initially, then another negative level each round for duration unless Fort save made. A Heal check (DC 23) or restoration/greater restoration stops the drain. Undead touched gain 4d4×5 temp hp for 1 hour.

name: Consumptive Field
description: All creatures in area with fewer than 0 HP that fail Will save die; caster gains 1d8 temp hp per death and +2 Str until duration ends. Caster level increases by 1 per death (max +½ original CL) for determining spell effects.

name: Ghost Trap
description: Creates field of energy that turns all incorporeal creatures within it corporeal. Creatures cannot turn ethereal or become nonethereal within the field.

name: Incorporeal Nova
description: Destroys incorporeal and gaseous creatures: 1d4 HD/level (max 20d4). Affects shadows, wraiths, spectres, ghosts, gaseous vampires. Creatures with fewest HD affected first; no creature with 9+ HD affected.

name: Spawn Screen
description: Subject cannot rise as undead spawn if killed by a spawn-creating undead (such as ghoul fever or wight energy drain) while the spell's duration is active.
